impact: This gives the worker daemon ordered next steps after the completed backlog while reducing repeat validation churn from recent Python syntax failures and keeping fixture-first work ahead of live or authenticated automation.
summary: Appended the next narrow PP&D daemon tranche to the task board, starting with syntactic-validity guardrails before further crawler, extraction, DevHub, and guardrail work.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
